meaning: n.皮特(Peter 的昵称)(m.) n.<美俚>保险箱,银箱
examples: Pete gobbled all the beef stew.
Do you know Pete? He's hilarious.
Pete can't go and I can't either.
"Pete's job is to be Pete Rose, " said Joie Casey, president of Hit King Inc.
For Pete La Colla, whose company, Street Corner, franchises convenience stores, the rationale is similar.
